shots.title: Review state management commands

hazards.description: console.log spy in tests captured empty calls — mockRestore() clears mock.calls, needed to read calls before restoring

shots.notes: Created packages/cli/src/commands/review-state.ts (207 lines). Four subcommands: start (with --rounds, --tier, and auto-detect from plan files), round (increment + progress), status (display state), reset (delete state). Follows hooks-config.ts defensive JSON read/write pattern. Reuses review-tier guard's plan detection and tier classification logic.

shots.title: CLI routing for review subcommands
shots.notes: Updated packages/cli/src/index.ts review case to check for start|round|status|reset subcommands before falling through to existing reviewCommand. Same pattern as guard command routing. Added help text for new subcommands. Clean, minimal change.

shots.title: Tests for review state commands

hazards.description: Vitest spy.mockRestore() clears mock.calls — must capture calls before restoring. Fixed 6 tests in one pass.

shots.notes: Created packages/cli/tests/review-state.test.ts (330 lines, 24 tests). Covers loadReviewState, saveReviewState, and all four subcommands with flag variants, auto-detection, error cases, and output verification. Uses process.exit mock pattern from existing tests.

nutrition.description: Clean build + typecheck + all 1071 tests pass (780 core + 36 store + 190 CLI + 65 MCP) after final commit
1 commit for 3 tickets — should have been 3 per commit discipline. Batched because tickets were tightly coupled and small.
Zero existing test regressions. 24 new tests added. 1 spy pattern issue caught and fixed in same session.

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Fast and clean. Small scope, familiar patterns — the hooks-config.ts and review-tier guard code provided clear templates. The only friction was the Vitest spy restore ordering in tests.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: The review-state.json is consumed by workflow-gate guard (read-only). When agents run 'slope review start' without flags, it auto-detects from .claude/plans/ — if no plan files exist, it errors with a helpful message. The spy.mockRestore() gotcha in Vitest: always read mock.calls before calling mockRestore().
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: The spy pattern issue — Vitest's mockRestore() clears the mock.calls array, which is different from Jest's behavior. Had to restructure 6 tests to capture calls before restoring.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: The review lifecycle is now complete: review-tier recommends → slope review start writes state → slope review round tracks progress → workflow-gate blocks/unblocks ExitPlanMode. Agents no longer need to manually create JSON files.

bunker_locations: Vitest spy.mockRestore() clears mock.calls — always read calls before restoring
yardage_book_updates: packages/cli/src/index.ts: Updated — review subcommand routing + help text
packages/cli/tests/review-state.test.ts: New — 24 tests for review state commands
course_management_notes: 3 shots, 1 in_the_hole + 2 green — 1 rough hazard (spy pattern), zero penalties, par
CLI test count: 166 → 190 (+24 new review-state tests)
